core_identity.short_npc_pitch: Rema Three-Lantern is a rangers anchored to Nomdara Caravan, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both in play.

public_vs_private.public_face: Convoy pathfinder whose reputation rests on reading weather, toll mood, and roadside deceit at once. Travel kit, route marks, and timing-focused movement signal that Rema Three-Lantern lives by roads, passages, or convoy rhythm.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Rema Three-Lantern presents as Thinks in movement, timing, and obstacle management, treating delay as a concrete threat. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a rangers still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Travel kit, route marks, and timing-focused movement signal that Rema Three-Lantern lives by roads, passages, or convoy rhythm.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep Nomdara Caravan workable through the obligations of rangers while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan. Must keep timing, safety, and route credibility aligned when any disruption threatens all three. Around Nomdara Caravan, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of rangers visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must keep timing, safety, and route credibility aligned when any disruption threatens all three. Around Nomdara Caravan, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of rangers visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Rangers, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Nomdara Caravan.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep Nomdara Caravan workable through the obligations of rangers while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for local leverage, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Principled / Severe. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Rema Three-Lantern can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Rangers too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Rema Three-Lantern adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around Nomdara Caravan learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Rema Three-Lantern or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Rema Three-Lantern as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside Nomdara Caravan: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Rema Three-Lantern can propagate upward through Nomdara Caravan if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

relationships.note: Rangers legacy influence carried into current practice.

hooks.summary: Rema Three-Lantern can pull the party into chokepoints, timing failures, or rival claims over how movement should happen.
Rema Three-Lantern will share route intelligence, hidden timing, or safer alternatives if the party proves useful under travel pressure.
Rema Three-Lantern needs help reading a blocked path, escorting traffic, or reopening safe movement through Nomdara Caravan.

who_avoids_them: those who do not respect route discipline

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Rangers.
